name: Foaster
long_description:
Consulting hasn’t evolved much in decades. Yet it is still slow, expensive, and built on partial visibility.

AI finally makes a new model possible.

At Foaster.ai, our agents interview employees at scale, reconstruct a detailed map of how the company actually works, and reason on top of it to generate recommendations. 

Unlike traditional consulting, which usually relies on a limited set of interviews and an incomplete view of operations, this lets us tackle much more complex problems with far greater precision. 

Human experts stay in the loop to validate the output, challenge the reasoning when needed, deliver the final recommendations, and improve the system over time.

We can already work with companies today on:
• Process mapping: map operations you have never fully understood, yet that are critical to the business
• AI roadmap design: identify at scale where AI could have the highest impact across your organization
• Cost reduction: surface inefficiencies buried across workflows, teams, and day-to-day operations

What used to take weeks or months can now be explored in a few days, with much greater visibility into how the company actually works. And once that operational map exists, we can solve more and more business problems on top of the same foundation without starting from scratch.
